name: com.unai.universal-ai-connector
description: Connect Unity to any AI provider with a unified API. Supports OpenAI (GPT-5), Anthropic Claude (Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.5), Google Gemini (3/2.5), Mistral, Cohere (Command A), Ollama, LM Studio, llama.cpp, and any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (xAI Grok, DeepSeek, etc.). Features streaming, async/await, and cross-platform support including WebGL.
